searchify.config.title: Searchify Settings
searchify.config.category.general.toolti: Main parameters for item searching and highlighting.
searchify.config.enabled.name: Enable Mod
searchify.config.enabled.desc: Fully enables or disables the item search and hiding logic.
searchify.config.displayMode.name: Highlight Mode
searchify.config.displayMode.desc:
Choose how items are visualized during a search.

§lPop / Pop-out Animation§r - spring-like shrinking of hidden items.
§lTexture§r - texture overlay on hidden items.
§lColor§r - colored background for matched items.
§lOutline§r - outline around matched items.
§lScale Animation§r - enlargement of matched items.
§lTransparency§r - transparency applied to unmatched items.
searchify.config.animationSpeed.name: Animation Speed (%)
searchify.config.animationSpeed.desc: Only used in Pop / Pop-out Animation or Scale Animation modes.
searchify.config.highlightColor.name: Color
searchify.config.highlightColor.desc: Used only in COLOR and OUTLINE modes.
searchify.config.ghostAlpha.name: Transparency (%)
searchify.config.pulseScale.name: Scale Animation Strength (%)
searchify.config.pulseScale.desc: Only used in Scale Animation mode.
searchify.config.autoLock.name: Lock Search Box
searchify.config.autoLock.desc: If enabled, the search box will be locked open by default and remember your text even after restarting the game.
searchify.config.category.guis.tooltip: Configure which screens will display the search bar
searchify.config.chest.desc: Show the search bar in the chest interface.
searchify.config.barrel.desc: Show the search bar in the barrel interface.
searchify.config.enderChest.desc: Show the search bar in the ender chest interface.
searchify.config.trappedChest.desc: Show the search bar in the trapped chest interface.
searchify.config.copperChest.desc: Show the search bar in the copper chest interface.
searchify.config.shulkerBox.desc: Show the search bar in the shulker box interface.
searchify.config.searchInside.name: Search Inside Containers
searchify.config.searchInside.desc: If enabled, the search will also check the contents of shulker boxes and bundles present in the inventory.
searchify.config.keybind.name: Fast Search Keybind
searchify.config.keybind.desc: Press this key while hovering over an item to automatically insert it into the search.
searchify.config.enableHistory.name: Search History
searchify.config.enableHistory.desc: Displays a history button next to the search bar to access the last 5 queries.
